## PlanInput.remoteNames property

Names currently observed in the remote library, when available. Enables baseline reconciliation on first run and avoids no-op deletes. When omitted, the plan is computed from desired-vs-state alone.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly remoteNames?: readonly string[] | undefined;
```
